{{/* Build once and cache in scratch */}} {{ partial "nav-build.html" . }} {{ $docsPages := .Scratch.Get "nav_pages" }} {{ $allPaths := slice }} {{ $relPaths := slice }} {{ $filteredPages := slice }} {{ range .Site.AllPages }} {{ if .File }} {{ $allPaths = $allPaths | append .File.Filename }} {{ $relPaths = $relPaths | append .File.Path }} {{ $filteredPages = $filteredPages | append . }} {{ end }} {{ end }} {{/* Calculate common base path */}} {{ $basePath := "" }} {{ if gt (len $allPaths) 0 }} {{ $basePath = index $allPaths 0 }} {{ range $allPaths }} {{ $basePath = strings.TrimSuffix "/" $basePath }} {{ $path := strings.TrimSuffix "/" . }} {{ $shorter := cond (lt (len $basePath) (len $path)) $basePath $path }} {{ $foundDiff := false }} {{ range $i := seq 0 (sub (len $shorter) 1) }} {{ if not $foundDiff }} {{ if ne (substr $basePath $i 1) (substr $path $i 1) }} {{ $basePath = substr $basePath 0 $i }} {{ $foundDiff = true }} {{ end }} {{ end }} {{ end }} {{ end }} {{ end }} {{/* Determine top-level section from relative paths (ignore top-level _index.md) */}} {{ $rootDir := "" }} {{ range $relPaths }} {{ if eq $rootDir "" }} {{ $parts := split . "/" }} {{ if gt (len $parts) 1 }} {{ $rootDir = printf "%s/" (index $parts 0) }} {{ end }} {{ end }} {{ end }} {{/* docsPages already from nav-build */}} {{/* Render tree directly at content root, no wrapper item */}} {{ template "filetree" (dict "currentDir" "" "pages" $docsPages "currentPage" .) }}
{{/* Recursive template for file tree navigation */}} {{ define "filetree" }} {{ $currentDir := .currentDir }} {{ $pages := .pages }} {{ $currentPage := .currentPage }} {{ $subdirs := dict }} {{ $currentPages := slice }} {{/* Separate pages and directories */}} {{ range $pages }} {{ $rel := .File.Path }} {{ $relPath := strings.TrimPrefix $currentDir $rel }} {{ $parts := split $relPath "/" }} {{ if eq (len $parts) 1 }} {{ $currentPages = $currentPages | append . }} {{ else }} {{ $subdir := index $parts 0 }} {{ $subdirs = merge $subdirs (dict $subdir (dict)) }} {{ end }} {{ end }} {{/* Create unified list of pages and directories sorted by weight */}} {{ $allItems := slice }} {{/* Add individual pages */}} {{ range $currentPages }} {{ if ne .File.BaseFileName "_index" }} {{ $allItems = $allItems | append (dict "type" "page" "weight" (.Params.weight | default 999) "page" .) }} {{ end }} {{ end }} {{/* Add subdirectories */}} {{ range $subdir, $_ := $subdirs }} {{ $subdirPages := slice }} {{ $subdirIndex := "" }} {{ range $pages }} {{ if hasPrefix .File.Path (printf "%s%s/" $currentDir $subdir) }} {{ $subdirPages = $subdirPages | append . }} {{ if eq .File.Path (printf "%s%s/_index.md" $currentDir $subdir) }} {{ $subdirIndex = . }} {{ end }} {{ end }} {{ end }} {{ if gt (len $subdirPages) 0 }} {{ $weight := 999 }} {{ if $subdirIndex }} {{ $weight = $subdirIndex.Params.weight | default 999 }} {{ end }} {{ $allItems = $allItems | append (dict "type" "directory" "weight" $weight "name" $subdir "pages" $subdirPages "index" $subdirIndex) }} {{ end }} {{ end }} {{/* Render all items sorted by weight */}} {{ range sort $allItems "weight" }} {{ if eq .type "page" }} {{/* Render individual page */}}
  • {{ or .page.Params.linkTitle (or .page.Title (replace .page.File.ContentBaseName `-` ` ` | title)) }}
    • {{ else if eq .type "directory" }} {{- $subdirActive := false }} {{- $isIndexPage := false }} {{- $subdirIndex := .index }} {{- $collapsible := true }} {{- if and $subdirIndex (isset $subdirIndex.Params "collapsible") }} {{- $collapsible = $subdirIndex.Params.collapsible }} {{- end }} {{- range .pages }} {{- if eq $currentPage.RelPermalink .RelPermalink }} {{- $subdirActive = true }} {{- if and $subdirIndex (eq .RelPermalink $subdirIndex.RelPermalink) }} {{- $isIndexPage = true }} {{- end }} {{- end }} {{- end }} {{- $subdirId := printf "%s-%s" ($currentDir | anchorize) (.name | anchorize) }}
  • {{- if $collapsible }} {{- else }}
    {{- if $subdirIndex -}} {{- or $subdirIndex.Params.linkTitle (or $subdirIndex.Title (replace .name `-` ` ` | title)) -}} {{- else -}} {{ replace .name `-` ` ` | title }} {{- end -}}
    {{- end }}
      {{- template "filetree" (dict "currentDir" (printf "%s%s/" $currentDir .name) "pages" .pages "currentPage" $currentPage) -}}
    • {{ end }} {{ end }} {{ end }}
